_legend.description: Top-100 discriminative exemplars per cell, ranked by margin (similarity to own centroid minus similarity to nearest competing centroid). Higher margin = more clearly in this cell and away from all others. These are the most useful examples for understanding what makes each cell distinct.

face_descriptions.27cell: Full 27-cell address: operator(Resolution, Site). All three axes.
face_descriptions.act_face: Act face (Mode × Domain): the 9 operators. What transformation is happening.
face_descriptions.site_face: Site face (Domain × Object): 9 terrain types. Where in reality the target is.
face_descriptions.resolution_face: Resolution face (Mode × Object): 9 engagement stances. At what grain the transformation lands.

exemplar_fields.clause: The original sentence from the corpus (untranslated)
exemplar_fields.language: ISO 639-1 language code (e.g. en, fr, ja)
exemplar_fields.sim_own: Cosine similarity to this cell's centroid [0-1, higher=closer]
exemplar_fields.sim_nearest_other: Cosine similarity to the nearest competing centroid
exemplar_fields.margin_face: margin vs nearest competitor within same face
exemplar_fields.margin_composite: For 27cell: minimum margin across all four faces. Clause must be unambiguous as operator, site, resolution, AND full-cell. Ranking key for 27cell.
exemplar_fields.rank: 1=most discriminative (ranked by margin_composite for 27cell, margin_face otherwise)

operators.SYN: Generating × Structure — merge into emergent whole
operators.ALT: Differentiating × Significance — change value within frame
operators.REC: Generating × Significance — change the frame itself

site_face_terrain.Void: Existence × Condition — ambient substrate of being
site_face_terrain.Kind: Existence × Pattern — a type or category
site_face_terrain.Network: Structure × Pattern — an architecture of connections
site_face_terrain.Lens: Significance × Entity — a specific reading or frame
site_face_terrain.Paradigm: Significance × Pattern — a worldview or interpretive framework

resolution_face_stances.Dissecting: Differentiating × Entity — taking apart a specific thing
resolution_face_stances.Cultivating: Generating × Condition — producing conditions for emergence
resolution_face_stances.Making: Generating × Entity — producing a specific thing
resolution_face_stances.Composing: Generating × Pattern — producing regularities or structures

entity_types.Emanon: Ground-dominant (Condition targets) — ambient, pre-figural, proliferates when examined
entity_types.Holon: Balanced (Entity targets) — stable, clear identity, self-maintaining
entity_types.Protogon: Pattern-dominant (Pattern targets) — crystallizing, identities still forming

Q1_Mode.question: Is this transformation separating, connecting, or producing?

Q2_Domain.question: Is it operating on existence, organization, or meaning?

Q3_Object.question: Is the target a background condition, a specific thing, or a pattern?
